series_metadata.series_title: Responses to RFPs / RFQs / RFIs for debt issuance and management services
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of bids submitted by companies in response to Requests for Proposals (RFPs), Request for Qualifications (RFQs), and Requests for Information (RFIs) published by or on behalf of the Commissioners of the Sinking Fund, Department of Debt Management, or other offices whose operations were merged into either of these entities.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two years after the expiration of the contract or closing of transaction for which the response to the RFP / RFI / RFQ was submitted. For RFQ / RFI responses that do not not pertain to a fixed term contract, retain for two years after new RFQ / RFI for same or similar services is published. If no subsequent RFQ / RFI is published for same or similar services, then retain responses for four years from publication of RFQ / RFI., Paper: Shred
